text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've decided to rethink our entire<n>project, which
means going back to<n>the basics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking it out, we come to the<n>realization that
conveying emotions<n>like gratitude isn't a one-way
street—the fans' voices matter too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello once wished for nothing<n>more than to
see her dear idol shine.<n>She needed the Grand
Concert—not<n>as a runner, but as a fan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what exactly about the Grand<n>Concert speaks
so deeply to fans like<n>her? That's the question we
now<n>need to answer.
